I deal if we have the internal brainstorming meeting this week, and then as you mentioned, Jason, because we need a little bit more information, maybe we also sideline that request as well, or we can do internal brainstorm, decide like what the parameters are, and then what the gaps are, and then ask for resources at that external meeting or in the meeting.
Does that seem like what we've kind of aligned on?
Yeah, just for internal meetings, just putting on our calendars for external, I think which is more useful out there to coordinate.
Yeah.
Sweet.
Awesome, guys.
We'll talk soon.
Yeah.
You guys later, bye bye.
Bye, Jason.
Congrats on the new job.
Thank you.
had a great day to go, right now.
Bye, guys.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on DataGrid's PLG strategy and reallocation of resources to support their growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DataGrid is seeking a PLG motion and sees GrowthX as their extended marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Current work streams (outbound, content) haven't yielded desired user growth](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Team needs to develop a comprehensive strategy balancing DataGrid's needs with scalable GrowthX offerings](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Internal brainstorming needed before proposing next steps to DataGrid](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid's Current State and Needs

  - [Revenue unclear, but paying GrowthX $40k/month](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Seeking product-market fit and user growth](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Wants to pivot from outbound to PLG motion](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Purchased domain for potential AI agent marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### GrowthX's Current Engagement

  - [Outbound efforts paused; focus shifted to content/SEO](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Challenges with programmatic content due to lack of templates](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Not fully delivering on SOW items (e.g., webinars, events)](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Strategic Considerations

  - [DataGrid seen as potential strategic partner (similar to AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Need to balance custom strategy work with scalable offerings](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Importance of retaining high-value client despite challenges](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Proposed Solutions and Next Steps

  - [Internal brainstorming session to align on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with DataGrid to present ideas and gather more information](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Potential focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [User stories/case studies](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [LinkedIn content strategy (product-focused vs. thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [Webinars and events](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [Website redesign and CRO](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Resource Allocation

  - [Possibility of dedicating full-time resource to DataGrid](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Need to clarify scope of work and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ping Wits to schedule internal brainstorming session (this week if possible)](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Plan external brainstorming session with DataGrid (aim for next week)](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Jason and Mara to collaborate on preparing for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Review SOW and identify gaps in current delivery](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Gather more information on DataGrid's product, users, and goals](https://fathom.video/share/FF3fJbjjTawTvfByJ2SpCB9yj7ToHAJq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

action_items.description: Support Jason in reviewing SOW, preparing for internal brainstorm
Review Data Grid SOW, identify unexecuted items, current capabilities
Reach out to Wits to help schedule external brainstorm with Tiago & team
Schedule internal brainstorm meeting this week. Invite team members.
